references.name: D2MOO
policy: Use source code to recover gameplay intent, names and control-flow concepts.
Never reuse 32-bit addresses, ordinals, structure layouts or ABI assumptions in D2R.
Prove every D2R 3.2.92777 correspondence independently in the persistent workbench.

references.name: D2SSharp
references.upstreamTarget: Diablo II and D2R save formats 96-105
policy: Use the pinned implementation to verify D2S and D2I section layouts, version boundaries and bit encodings.
Keep BKVince TXT files as the sole gameplay-data and item-stat encoding source.
Preserve MIT attribution for any source code adapted rather than independently reimplemented.

references.name: eezstreet D2RL-Plugins
references.upstreamTarget: D2RLoader PluginPack 2.0.1 for Diablo II: Resurrected
policy: Treat the pinned CMake files, headers and plugin sources as the authoritative PluginPack skeleton; the upstream README may lag the implementation.
Never edit the governed clean checkout. Develop RuffnecKk integrations in the separate build-specific workbench clone.
Before designing a plugin, inventory the owning module, shared structures, configuration keys, RVAs and hook ranges against this pinned commit.
Advance the pin only through an explicit reviewed update; never silently mix evidence from different PluginPack commits.
Preserve eezstreet's MIT attribution and distinguish upstream code from independently implemented RuffnecKk features.
